titleStmt.title: SII 4.1153: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1153. (A.R. No. 286 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ jayati vinayava¨rttī tyāgasatyaprasū tasthirataraguṇalakṣmī[¨r*]ddha¨rmmani¨rmmāṇadakṣaḥ nijaviśadayaśaḥ śrī
ma kēsminnijavaṁśavāridhilasacchītāṁśuraṁsasthalabhrājadvīraramāriraṁsuranagha[*ḥ] śrībuddhava¨rmmā nṛpaḥ ji bhujāsikhaṇḍitaripustōma
nī dānasamudra Ityatulitaprakhyātanāmōnnataḥ [. *2] tadvaṁśajēṣvathaguṇavrajasaṁyutēgha gacchatsvanēkadharaṇījanavallabhēṣu . śrīkoṇḍyadēsaṭirabhūdvipulēṣu tēṣu śrī
du¨rjjayānvayalasadgṛharatnadīpaḥ [. 3*] kaṇḍravāḍiviṣayaṁcca sa koṇḍaḥ kōnarāṣṭramalabhaddalitāriḥ . rājalāṁcchanasamunnatamudyadrājabhīmadharaṇīśvararatnāt [. 4*] tasmāt khyāta
vicāraśca jātaḥ pōtassutōttamaḥ . tasyānujō mahātējā bhīmō bhimaparākramaḥ [. 5*] rāyaḥ koṇḍōnakhōgaṇḍaḥ kētaḥ pōtassutōttamaḥ . bādaḥ paśupati¨rgguṇḍa Ityāsustanayā
stataḥ [. 6*] tatrāsīnmahanīyakī¨rttilatikākaṁddālavālōllasatsaujanyādimahāguṇaikavasatiḥ śrīkōnapōtaḥ kṛtī . jitvā yastrikaliṁggavallabhamahçō rājēṁdracōḍāya vai prādā
ddu¨rjjayavaṁśarājatilakaḥ kāliṁgagaṇḍadvipān® [. 7*] yaḥ kulōttuṁggacōḍasya kāruṇyēnālabhadvibhuḥ . veṁggīṁdranāmadēyaṁ ca vēṁgīgrāmasahasrakaṁ [. 8*] tasya jēṣṭhō mahātējā rājarāja
nṛpōttamaḥ . tatputraḥ pōtabhūpālaśśatruhaṁttābhavadbhuvi [. 9*] putrau tasya yaśōdhanasyasumatēḥ pōtasya cūḍāmaṇē¨rbhbhūpa va du¨rjjayānvayavatāṁ śrīrājarājādhipaḥ . toṇḍa
ritō yēṣvavadhikaḥ krūrārini¨rddāraṇastoṇḍaścaṇḍaparākramō vitanutē kī¨rttyānaghō¨rvvīmmudā [. 10*] lakṣmīriva priyatamā va śaśvaduragādhipabhūṣaṇasya peddāṁbikāsya dharaṇīśva
nijakulāṁbudhicaṁdralēkhā . jātaḥ pratāpa
Digital edition of SII 4.1153 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
